items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Video conferencing (Zoom, Teams, Google Meet) - auto-create', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions this need, yet lacks specific API endpoints or evidence of successful integration or data flow related to video conferencing. Therefore, the requirement cannot be assessed, leading to a blocked status due to inconclusive evidence.
